title: Text Analysis Path
description: Build fluency in Text Analysis inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Text Classification
steps.summary: Text Classification belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Analysis. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Analysis. Start after Text-to-Text Models and Classification. It opens into Few-Shot Text Classification and Zero-Shot Text Classification.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: SQuAD (Stanford Question Answering Dataset)
steps.summary: SQuAD (Stanford Question Answering Dataset) belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Analysis. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Analysis. Start after Question Answering and SQuAD 1.1.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Topic Modeling
steps.summary: Topic Modeling belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Analysis. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Analysis. Start after Topic Model. It opens into Topic Modeling Integration and probabilistic topic modeling.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Entity Linking
steps.summary: Entity Linking belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Analysis. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Analysis. Compare it with Cross-Lingual Entity Linking and Entity Shuffling. It opens into Cross-Lingual Entity Linking and Entity-Level Sentiment Linking.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Sentiment Analysis
steps.summary: Sentiment Analysis belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Analysis. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Analysis. Compare it with Morphological Analysis and VQA v2. It opens into Sentiment Analysis AI and AI in Sentiment Analysis.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Question Answering
steps.summary: Question Answering belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Analysis. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Analysis. Compare it with Question Answering (QA) and Extractive Question Answering. It opens into Question Answering (QA) and Extractive Question Answering.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Coreference Resolution
steps.summary: Coreference Resolution belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Analysis. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Analysis. Compare it with Event Coreference Resolution and Coreference Resolution with Deep Learning. It opens into Event Coreference Resolution and Coreference Resolution with Deep Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Microsoft Semantic Kernel
steps.summary: Microsoft Semantic Kernel belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Analysis. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Analysis. Start after Semantic Kernel and Kernel Methods.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
